'''nadazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygmydom|pygmydom]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-d-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygmydom|pygmydom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nadazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nædæzhæth|nædæzhæth]] || [[word:nædæzhæj|nædæzhæj]] || [[word:nædæzhæsh|nædæzhæsh]] || [[word:nædæzhæ|nædæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nadadazhath|nadadazhath]] || [[word:nadadazhaj|nadadazhaj]] || [[word:nadadazhash|nadadazhash]] || [[word:nadadazha|nadadazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nadazhath|nadazhath]] || [[word:nadazhaj|nadazhaj]] || [[word:nadazhash|nadazhash]] || [[word:nadazha|nadazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadafzhath|nadafzhath]] || [[word:nadafzhaj|nadafzhaj]] || [[word:nadafzhash|nadafzhash]] || [[word:nadafzhaf|nadafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nadazhatha|nadazhatha]] || [[word:nadazhaja|nadazhaja]] || [[word:nadazhasha|nadazhasha]] || [[word:nadazhaka|nadazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nadazhath|nadazhath]] || [[word:nadazhaj|nadazhaj]] || [[word:nadazhash|nadazhash]] || [[word:nadazha|nadazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nadazhathal|nadazhathal]] || [[word:nadazhajal|nadazhajal]] || [[word:nadazhashal|nadazhashal]] || [[word:nadazhakal|nadazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nadazhathatha|nadazhathatha]] || [[word:nadazhajaja|nadazhajaja]] || [[word:nadazhashasha|nadazhashasha]] || [[word:nadazhaka|nadazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nadazhathan|nadazhathan]] || [[word:nadazhajan|nadazhajan]] || [[word:nadazhashan|nadazhashan]] || [[word:nadazhakan|nadazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nadazhathaoro|nadazhathaoro]] || [[word:nadazhajaoro|nadazhajaoro]] || [[word:nadazhashaoro|nadazhashaoro]] || [[word:nadazhakaoro|nadazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
